policy_statement: Seattle City Light is implementing two charging infrastructure pilot programs, including installation of 20 public fast charging stations and a residential charging program expected to launch in fall 2018.
Seattle's Green Fleet Action Plan guides efforts to reduce municipal fleet emissions by 50 percent by 2025 through electrification, cleaner fuels, efficiency, and procurement standards.
Seattle adopted a Resource Conservation Management Plan through Resolution 31491 with a goal of reducing energy use across City-owned buildings by 20 percent by 2020 from a 2008 baseline.

Seattle will double its budget allocation from 2021 to 2025 for reducing energy in municipal buildings and set a target of a 40 percent energy and carbon emissions reduction in municipal buildings by 2025.
